name: bootadmin
description: An open source Bootstrap admin panel theme

scripts.build:vendor: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='node_modules/bootstrap/dist';fs.copyFileSync(src+'/css/bootstrap.min.css','style/vendor/bootstrap.min.css');fs.copyFileSync(src+'/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js','scripts/vendor/bootstrap.min.js');const css=['animate.css','animsition.min.css','waves.min.css','dropzone.css','feathericons.css'].map(f=>fs.readFileSync('style/vendor/'+f,'utf8')).join('\n');fs.writeFileSync('style/vendor/library.min.css',css);console.log('Vendor files updated to Bootstrap 5');"

author: Sazzad Hossain
